title: No More Ender Pearl Damage
description: Removes damage from ender pearls, plus some extra pear features
body:
**Features**

- Regular pearls no longer deal damage
- Regular pearls do not spawn endermites
- Cracked pearls can be crafted which deal damage, but have no cooldown and can stack to 64
- Cracked pearls have a 20% chance to spawn an endermite

![Cracked Pearl crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d47c7466b1827838d0b895d8ef8290b5e1f1277f.png)

Thank you Monky for the Cracked Pearl texture.

Highly recommend pairing this mod with [**lenient stack size**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lenient-stack-size) so ender pearls can also stack to 64
